title: Ryder Windham

'''Ryder Windham''' is the author of over sixty ''Star Wars'' books. He was also an editor of ''Star Wars'' comics for [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Biography==
In the mid-1990s Ryder Windham was Dark Horse's group editor for licensed titles.<ref name="secrets">''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''</ref>

He was also said to have overseen the Dark Horse series ''[[Heir to the Empire]]'', [[Jabba the Hutt (comics)|''Jabba the Hutt'']], ''[[Star Wars: River of Chaos|River of Chaos]]'', [[Splinter of the Mind's Eye (comics)|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'']], and [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (comic series)|''Shadow of the Empire'']], and issues of ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' (which were all also credited as being edited by various other editors at Dark Horse in the books themselves).

Windham also edited and wrote scripts for [[Star Wars: Droids (Dark Horse)|''Star Wars: Droids'']] released by Dark Horse.

Windham worked closely at the time with [[Allan Kausch]] and [[Sue Rostoni]] at [[Lucas Licensing]] to maintain [[Canon|continuity]] between the comics, books and other ''Star Wars'' properties.

He resides in Providence, Rhode Island with his wife and two daughters.

{{Author-stub}}
